title: pleuropteropyrum hagei
intro: Pleuropteropyrum hagei is a plant species native to Korea, classified in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Pleuropteropyrum hagei is often made into a decoction or extract, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
